title: Elders Trailblaze in Vaccinations
summary: Elders Trailblaze in Vaccinations Elder customer-owners lead by example receiving COVID-19 vaccine By Uinita Mauigoa Wisdom of Elders serves as one of the integral foundational guides for the advancement and prosperity of all Alaska Native cultures. The arrival of the COVID-19 vaccines coupled with the wisdom of Elders has contributed to a healthy start to a new chapter in th...
